introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.description: A file-routed Deno meta-framework that ships islands, not bundles.

getting-started.title: Getting started
getting-started.description: Scaffold a Chevalier app in one command.

pages.title: Pages
pages.description: File-routed Preact pages, loaders, forms, and actions.

islands.title: Islands
islands.description: Components that hydrate on the client — declared by path, no wrapper.

handlers.title: Handlers
handlers.description: Any route file can export a Hono sub-app to serve any HTTP method.

layouts.title: Layouts and error pages
layouts.description: The app shell, nested layouts, per-page head tags, 404 and 500.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Signed session cookies, read and written from a loader or action.

middleware.title: Middleware
middleware.description: Per-directory Hono middleware for auth guards, logging, and metrics.

testing.title: Testing
testing.description: Test loaders, actions, middleware and pages without booting Vite.

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.description: Build the client and SSR bundles, then serve or ship to Deno Deploy.
